entities.name: Careerspan

relationships.context: Identity is composed of meaningful stories that maintain internal consistency
Canonical resume is a flawed low-dimensional projection of identity
Human experience is the high-dimensional source data for professional identity
Readiness state replaces the search for a perfect canonical resume
Readiness state involves storing experience as modular units
Repository of evidence is built from accumulated meaningful stories
This semantic identity framework is foundational to Careerspan's coaching approach
